one_liner: Zoho Cliq offers a broad, self-serve REST API (v2/v3) secured via Zoho OAuth 2.0, with an official MCP server configurable through the Zoho MCP console, making it readily buildable for agent toolkits.

auth_methods.notes: Standard Zoho OAuth 2.0 via Zoho API Console; register app for Client ID/Secret, obtain access token, use 'Zoho-oauthtoken' Bearer-style prefix in Authorization header.

self_serve_notes: Free tier includes developer API access; register application in Zoho API Console to self-serve Client ID/Secret and OAuth tokens, no sales contact needed.

api_surface.notes: REST API v3 (and v2) covering messages, channels, chats, files, bots, reminders, slash commands, etc. Also has OpenAPI spec and a serverless developer platform for building extensions/bots.

evidence.supports: REST API v3 overview and authentication details
Self-serve app registration in Zoho API Console for Client ID/Secret
Free tier includes developer API access
Zoho Cliq developer platform and MCP server configuration via Zoho MCP console
